    AppendRecordsRequest

    AppendRecordsRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the AppendRecordsRequest parameter options.
    AppendRecordsResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.appendRecords.
    Avro
    Utility class containing static methods for encoding and decoding Avro binary objects.
    BulkInserter<T>
    Object that manages the insertion into GPUdb of large numbers of records in bulk, with automatic batch management and support for multi-head ingest.
    BulkInserter.FlushOptions
    This class facilitates customizing the behavior of automatic flush in BulkInserter The default value of the 'flushInterval' is set to a negative value to indicate that the automatic flush feature is not needed.
    BulkInserter.InsertException
    An exception that occurred during the insertion of records into GPUdb.
    BulkInserter.WorkerList Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    This class has been superseded by com.gpudb.WorkerList.

    A set of string constants for the DownloadFilesRequest parameter options.
    DownloadFilesResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.downloadFiles.
    DownloadIoJob
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    DownloadOptions
    This class allows the user of the GPUdbFileHandler class methods for download like - GPUdbFileHandler.download(String, String, DownloadOptions, FileDownloadListener) and GPUdbFileHandler.download(List, String, DownloadOptions, FileDownloadListener) to specify the download options which could be applied to the current download operation.
    DropBackupRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropBackup.
    DropBackupRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the DropBackupRequest parameter options.
    DropBackupResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropBackup.
    DropCatalogRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropCatalog.
    DropCatalogResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropCatalog.
    DropContainerRegistryRequest  
    DropContainerRegistryResponse  
    DropContainerRegistryResponse.Info  
    DropCredentialRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropCredential.
    DropCredentialResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropCredential.
    DropDatasinkRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropDatasink.
    DropDatasinkRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the DropDatasinkRequest parameter options.
    DropDatasinkResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropDatasink.
    DropDatasourceRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropDatasource.
    DropDatasourceResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropDatasource.
    DropEnvironmentRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropEnvironment.
    DropEnvironmentRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the DropEnvironmentRequest parameter options.
    DropEnvironmentResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropEnvironment.
    DropModelRequest  
    DropModelResponse  
    DropModelResponse.Info  
    DropSchemaRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.dropSchema.
    DropSchemaRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the DropSchemaRequest parameter options.
    DropSchemaResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.dropSchema.
    ErrorHandlingMode  
    EvaluateModelRequest  
    EvaluateModelResponse  
    ExecuteProcRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.executeProc.
    ExecuteProcRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ExecuteProcRequest parameter options.
    ExecuteProcResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.executeProc.
    ExecuteSqlRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.executeSql.
    ExecuteSqlRequest.Encoding
    A set of string constants for the ExecuteSqlRequest parameter encoding.
    ExecuteSqlRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ExecuteSqlRequest parameter options.
    ExecuteSqlResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.executeSql.
    ExecuteSqlResponse.HasMoreRecords
    A set of string constants for the ExecuteSqlResponse parameter hasMoreRecords.
    ExecuteSqlResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the ExecuteSqlResponse parameter info.
    ExportQueryMetricsRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.exportQueryMetrics.
    ExportQueryMetricsRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ExportQueryMetricsRequest parameter options.
    ExportQueryMetricsResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.exportQueryMetrics.
    ExportQueryMetricsResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the ExportQueryMetricsResponse parameter info.
    ExportRecordsToFilesRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.exportRecordsToFiles.
    ExportRecordsToFilesRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ExportRecordsToFilesRequest parameter options.
    ExportRecordsToFilesResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.exportRecordsToFiles.
    ExportRecordsToTableRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.exportRecordsToTable.
    ExportRecordsToTableRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ExportRecordsToTableRequest parameter options.
    ExportRecordsToTableResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.exportRecordsToTable.
    FileDownloader
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    FileDownloadListener
    This interface provides callback method for - a. a complete single shot download of multiple files b. a part/segment download of a multi-part download c. one or more complete single part download
    FileIngestor
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    FileOperation
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    FileType  
    FileUploader
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    FileUploadListener
    This interface provides callback methods for - a. complete multi-part file upload b. a part of multi-part upload c. a complete single shot upload of multiple files An example usage can be as given below :
    FilterByAreaGeometryRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filterByAreaGeometry.
    FilterByAreaGeometryRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterByAreaGeometryRequest parameter options.
    FilterByAreaGeometryResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filterByAreaGeometry.
    FilterByAreaGeometryResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the FilterByAreaGeometryResponse parameter info.

    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filterByArea.
    FilterByAreaRequest.Options

    FilterByAreaResponse

    FilterByAreaResponse.Info

    FilterByBoxResponse

    FilterByGeometryResponse

    FilterByGeometryResponse.Info

    FilterByRadiusResponse

    FilterByRadiusResponse.Info

    FilterByRangeRequest

    FilterByRangeRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterByRangeRequest parameter options.
    FilterByRangeResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filterByRange.
    FilterByRangeResponse.Info

    FilterBySeriesRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filterBySeries.
    FilterBySeriesRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterBySeriesRequest parameter options.
    FilterBySeriesResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filterBySeries.
    FilterBySeriesResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the FilterBySeriesResponse parameter info.
    FilterByStringRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filterByString.
    FilterByStringRequest.Mode
    A set of string constants for the FilterByStringRequest parameter mode.
    FilterByStringRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterByStringRequest parameter options.
    FilterByStringResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filterByString.
    FilterByStringResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the FilterByStringResponse parameter info.
    FilterByTableRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filterByTable.
    FilterByTableRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterByTableRequest parameter options.
    FilterByTableResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filterByTable.
    FilterByTableResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the FilterByTableResponse parameter info.
    FilterByValueRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filterByValue.
    FilterByValueRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterByValueRequest parameter options.
    FilterByValueResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filterByValue.
    FilterByValueResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the FilterByValueResponse parameter info.
    FilterRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.filter.
    FilterRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the FilterRequest parameter options.
    FilterResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.filter.
    FilterResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the FilterResponse parameter info.
    FullFileBatchManager
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    FullFileDispatcher
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    FullFileDispatcher.FullFileDownloadTask
    This class represents a task handling the download of a bunch of full file downloads.
    FullFileDispatcher.FullFileUploadTask
    This class represents a task handling the upload of a bunch of full file uploads.
    GenericRecord
    An object that contains Record data based on a GPUdb Type specified at runtime.
    GetJobRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.getJob.
    GetJobRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the GetJobRequest parameter options.
    GetJobResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getJob.
    GetJobResponse.JobStatus
    A set of string constants for the GetJobResponse parameter jobStatus.
    GetJobResponse.ResponseEncoding
    A set of string constants for the GetJobResponse parameter responseEncoding.
    GetJobResponse.StatusMap
    A set of string constants for the GetJobResponse parameter statusMap.
    GetRecordsByColumnRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.getRecordsByColumn.
    GetRecordsByColumnRequest.Encoding
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsByColumnRequest parameter encoding.
    GetRecordsByColumnRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsByColumnRequest parameter options.
    GetRecordsByColumnResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsByColumn.
    GetRecordsBySeriesRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.getRecordsBySeries.
    GetRecordsBySeriesRequest.Encoding
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsBySeriesRequest parameter encoding.
    GetRecordsBySeriesResponse<T>
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsBySeries.
    GetRecordsFromCollectionRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.getRecordsFromCollection.
    GetRecordsFromCollectionRequest.Encoding
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsFromCollectionRequest parameter encoding.
    GetRecordsFromCollectionRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsFromCollectionRequest parameter options.
    GetRecordsFromCollectionResponse<T>
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsFromCollection.
    GetRecordsFromCollectionResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsFromCollectionResponse parameter info.
    GetRecordsRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.getRecords.
    GetRecordsRequest.Encoding
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsRequest parameter encoding.
    GetRecordsRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the GetRecordsRequest parameter options.
    GetRecordsResponse<T>
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecords.
    GetVectortileRequest  
    GetVectortileResponse  
    GPUdb
    Object that provides access to a specific GPUdb server.
    GPUdbBase
    Base class for the GPUdb API that provides general functionality not specific to any particular GPUdb request.
    GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo
    Helper class which contains all possible address related information for a given Kinetica cluster.
    GPUdbBase.FailbackOptions  
    GPUdbBase.GetRecordsJsonResponse
    This class models the response returned by the method GPUdbBase.getRecordsJson(java.lang.String, java.util.List<java.lang.String>, long, long) The default constructor is used to create instance whenever there is an error encountered by the method GPUdbBase.getRecordsJson(java.lang.String, java.util.List<java.lang.String>, long, long).
    GPUdbBase.GPUdbExitException
    A special exception indicating the server is shutting down
    GPUdbBase.GPUdbFailoverDisabledException  
    GPUdbBase.GPUdbHAUnavailableException  
    GPUdbBase.GPUdbHostnameRegexFailureException  
    GPUdbBase.GPUdbUnauthorizedAccessException
    Indicates that there is an authorization-related problem occurred.
    GPUdbBase.GPUdbVersion
    Contains the version of the client API or the GPUdb server.
    GPUdbBase.HAFailoverOrder
    A enumeration of high-availability (inter-cluster) failover order.
    GPUdbBase.HASynchronicityMode
    A enumeration of high-availability synchronicity override modes.
    GPUdbBase.InsertRecordsJsonRequest  
    GPUdbBase.JsonOptions
    This class provides options to control JSON ingest using BulkInserter.
    GPUdbBase.Options
    A set of configurable options for the GPUdb API.
    GPUdbBase.SubmitException
    An exception that occurred during the submission of a request to GPUdb.
    GPUdbException
    An exception that occurred during a GPUdb-related operation.
    GPUdbFileHandler
    This is the main class which exposes the API to be used by the end users.
    GPUdbFileHandler.Options
    This class models the options available for modifying some behaviors of the GPUdbFileHandler class.
    GPUdbFileHandlerUtils
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    GPUdbLogger  
    GPUdbRuntimeException  
    GPUdbSqlIterator<T extends Record>
    Kinetica API class for iterating over records returned by executing an SQL query.
    GrantPermissionCredentialRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.grantPermissionCredential.
    GrantPermissionCredentialRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the GrantPermissionCredentialRequest parameter permission.
    GrantPermissionCredentialResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.grantPermissionCredential.

    GrantPermissionDatasourceRequest.Permission

    HasRoleResponse

    InsertRecordsFromFilesResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.insertRecordsFromFiles.

    InsertRecordsFromQueryResponse

    InsertRecordsRandomRequest.Options

    InsertRecordsRandomResponse

    InsertRecordsRequest<T>

    InsertRecordsResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.insertRecords.
    InsertRecordsResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the InsertRecordsResponse parameter info.
    InsertSymbolRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.insertSymbol.
    InsertSymbolRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the InsertSymbolRequest parameter options.
    InsertSymbolRequest.SymbolFormat
    A set of string constants for the InsertSymbolRequest parameter symbolFormat.
    InsertSymbolResponse

    IoTask
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    JsonUtils  
    KifsDirectoryInfo  
    KifsFileInfo  
    KillProcRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.killProc.
    KillProcRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the KillProcRequest parameter options.
    KillProcResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.killProc.
    ListGraphRequest  
    ListGraphResponse  
    LockTableRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.lockTable.
    LockTableRequest.LockType
    A set of string constants for the LockTableRequest parameter lockType.
    LockTableResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.lockTable.
    MatchGraphRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.matchGraph.
    MatchGraphRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the MatchGraphRequest parameter options.
    MatchGraphRequest.SolveMethod
    A set of string constants for the MatchGraphRequest parameter solveMethod.
    MatchGraphResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.matchGraph.
    ModifyGraphRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.modifyGraph.
    ModifyGraphRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ModifyGraphRequest parameter options.
    ModifyGraphResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.modifyGraph.
    MultiPartDownloadInfo
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    MultiPartUploadInfo
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    MultiPartUploadInfo.MultiPartOperation
    This enum specifies the different operations/states that a multi-part file upload could go through.
    OpMode
    This is an enum indicating whether a particular operation is an upload or a download This is an enum used by the class Result which is used by the interfaces FileUploadListener and FileDownloadListener
    PartitionType  
    QueryGraphRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.queryGraph.
    QueryGraphRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the QueryGraphRequest parameter options.
    QueryGraphResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.queryGraph.
    RawAggregateGroupByResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.aggregateGroupByRaw.
    RawAggregateGroupByResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the RawAggregateGroupByResponse parameter info.
    RawAggregateUniqueResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.aggregateUniqueRaw.
    RawAggregateUniqueResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the RawAggregateUniqueResponse parameter info.
    RawAggregateUnpivotResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.aggregateUnpivotRaw.
    RawAggregateUnpivotResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the RawAggregateUnpivotResponse parameter info.
    RawExecuteSqlResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.executeSqlRaw.
    RawExecuteSqlResponse.HasMoreRecords
    A set of string constants for the RawExecuteSqlResponse parameter hasMoreRecords.
    RawExecuteSqlResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the RawExecuteSqlResponse parameter info.
    RawGetRecordsByColumnResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsByColumnRaw.
    RawGetRecordsBySeriesResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsBySeriesRaw.
    RawGetRecordsFromCollectionResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsFromCollectionRaw.
    RawGetRecordsFromCollectionResponse.Info
    A set of string constants for the RawGetRecordsFromCollectionResponse parameter info.
    RawGetRecordsResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.getRecordsRaw.
    RawGpudbResponse
    A set of parameters for the raw wrapper for GPUdb responses.
    RawInsertRecordsRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.insertRecordsRaw.
    RawInsertRecordsRequest.ListEncoding
    A set of string constants for the RawInsertRecordsRequest parameter listEncoding.
    RawInsertRecordsRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the RawInsertRecordsRequest parameter options.
    RawUpdateRecordsRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.updateRecordsRaw.
    RawUpdateRecordsRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the RawUpdateRecordsRequest parameter options.
    RawUpdateRecordsRequest.RecordEncoding
    A set of string constants for the RawUpdateRecordsRequest parameter recordEncoding.
    Record
    Interface for objects that contain record data.
    RecordBase
    Abstract class that provides default implementations of most methods of Record.
    RecordObject
    Abstract base class for objects that contain Record data with a schema defined at compile time.
    RecordObject.Column
    Indicates that a public field is a GPUdb type column.
    RecordObject.Type
    Provides additional information about a GPUdb type.
    RecordRetriever<T>
    Object that permits efficient retrieval of records from GPUdb, with support for multi-head access.
    RepartitionGraphRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.repartitionGraph.
    RepartitionGraphRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the RepartitionGraphRequest parameter options.
    RepartitionGraphResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.repartitionGraph.
    ReserveResourceRequest  
    ReserveResourceRequest.Action  
    ReserveResourceResponse  
    RestoreBackupRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.restoreBackup.
    RestoreBackupRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the RestoreBackupRequest parameter options.
    RestoreBackupRequest.RestoreObjectsMap
    A set of string constants for the RestoreBackupRequest parameter restoreObjectsMap.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.restoreBackup.
    Result
    This class encapsulates information about the outcome of an upload or a download operation.
    Result.SortByDownloadPartNumber
    This is an implementation of the Comparator interface used to sort the list of Result objects returned by background threads downloading parts of a file.
    RevokePermissionCredentialRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokePermissionCredential.
    RevokePermissionCredentialRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionCredentialRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionCredentialResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermissionCredential.
    RevokePermissionDatasourceRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokePermissionDatasource.
    RevokePermissionDatasourceRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionDatasourceRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionDatasourceResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermissionDatasource.
    RevokePermissionDirectoryRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokePermissionDirectory.
    RevokePermissionDirectoryRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionDirectoryRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionDirectoryResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermissionDirectory.
    RevokePermissionProcRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokePermissionProc.
    RevokePermissionProcRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionProcRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionProcResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermissionProc.
    RevokePermissionRequest

    RevokePermissionRequest.ObjectType
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionRequest parameter objectType.
    RevokePermissionRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionRequest parameter options.
    RevokePermissionRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermission.

    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokePermissionSystem.
    RevokePermissionSystemRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionSystemRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionSystemResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermissionSystem.
    RevokePermissionTableRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokePermissionTable.
    RevokePermissionTableRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionTableRequest parameter options.
    RevokePermissionTableRequest.Permission
    A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionTableRequest parameter permission.
    RevokePermissionTableResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokePermissionTable.
    RevokeRoleRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.revokeRole.
    RevokeRoleResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.revokeRole.
    ShowBackupRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.showBackup.
    ShowBackupRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the ShowBackupRequest parameter options.
    ShowBackupResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.showBackup.
    ShowContainerRegistryRequest  
    ShowContainerRegistryResponse  
    ShowContainerRegistryResponse.Info  
    ShowCredentialRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.showCredential.
    ShowCredentialResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.showCredential.
    ShowDatasinkRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.showDatasink.
    ShowDatasinkResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.showDatasink.
    ShowDatasinkResponse.AdditionalInfo
    A set of string constants for the ShowDatasinkResponse parameter additionalInfo.
    ShowDatasourceRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.showDatasource.
    ShowDatasourceResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.showDatasource.
    ShowDatasourceResponse.AdditionalInfo
    A set of string constants for the ShowDatasourceResponse parameter additionalInfo.
    ShowDatasourceResponse.StorageProviderTypes
    A set of string constants for the ShowDatasourceResponse parameter storageProviderTypes.

    A set of parameters for GPUdb.solveGraph.
    SolveGraphRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the SolveGraphRequest parameter options.
    SolveGraphRequest.SolverType
    A set of string constants for the SolveGraphRequest parameter solverType.
    SolveGraphResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.solveGraph.
    TableCreationOptions  
    TableCreationOptions.Option  
    Type
    Immutable collection of metadata about a GPUdb type.
    Type.Column
    Immutable collection of metadata about a column that is part of a GPUdb type.
    Type.Column.ColumnBaseType
    An enumeration of base types for column (excluding any property-related subtypes).
    Type.Column.ColumnType
    An enumeration of all the Kinetica column types (including sub-types that are determined by the properties used).
    TypeInferenceMode  
    TypeObjectMap<T>  
    TypeObjectMap.Accessor
    An accessor that returns a value from an object.
    TypeObjectMap.ClassFactory<T>
    A factory that uses reflection to create new instances of the specified class.
    TypeObjectMap.ConvertingFieldHandler
    A combined TypeObjectMap.Accessor and TypeObjectMap.Mutator that provides access to a specified field using reflection, converting the value to and from the data type of a specified GPUdb column.
    TypeObjectMap.ConvertingMethodHandler
    A combined TypeObjectMap.Accessor and TypeObjectMap.Mutator that provides access to a field via specified get and set methods using reflection, converting the value to and from the data type of a specified GPUdb column.
    TypeObjectMap.Factory<T>
    A factory that creates new instances of the specified class.
    TypeObjectMap.FieldHandler
    A combined TypeObjectMap.Accessor and TypeObjectMap.Mutator that provides access to a specified field using reflection.
    TypeObjectMap.MethodHandler
    A combined TypeObjectMap.Accessor and TypeObjectMap.Mutator that provides access to a field via specified get and set methods using reflection.
    TypeObjectMap.Mutator
    A mutator that sets a value in an object.
    UpdateRecordsRequest<T>
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.updateRecords.
    UpdateRecordsRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the UpdateRecordsRequest parameter options.
    UpdateRecordsResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.updateRecords.
    UploadFilesFromurlRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.uploadFilesFromurl.
    UploadFilesFromurlResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.uploadFilesFromurl.
    UploadFilesRequest
    A set of parameters for GPUdb.uploadFiles.
    UploadFilesRequest.Options
    A set of string constants for the UploadFilesRequest parameter options.
    UploadFilesResponse
    A set of results returned by GPUdb.uploadFiles.
    UploadIoJob
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    UploadOptions
    This class encapsulates the options that the users of the API exposed by GPUdbFileHandler class can use to set the options for the methods GPUdbFileHandler.upload(List, String, UploadOptions, FileUploadListener) and GPUdbFileHandler.upload(String, String, UploadOptions, FileUploadListener) The static method UploadOptions.defaultOptions() can be used to retrieve the default options for upload.
    UrlUtils

    A list of worker URLs to use for multi-head operations.
